usage_notes: web_path is a UTF-8 relative path usable by the web project.
MD-listed background and ending mappings are stored in md_mapping/planning_from_md.
Use the nine top-level bgm/*.wav files; backup_* folders are historical backups only.

bgm_manifest.author: 项目素材
bgm_manifest.scene_reason: 适合夜路、误会与独处气氛。

bgm_manifest.author: 项目素材
bgm_manifest.scene_reason: 明亮轻快，适合商场、玩具店、中奖和喜剧情绪。
